message:
refactor(search,ui): simplify two-tier search and streamline UI components

Reduce code complexity across the search and UI layers (net -14 lines).

- two_tier_search.rs: Simplify search pipeline logic, removing
  redundant intermediate steps
- analytics_charts.rs: Remove 10 lines of unused chart rendering code
- app.rs: Streamline application state handling, reducing boilerplate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
